summary: Warm, balanced soundboard capture of a stellar Greek Theatre show highlighted by scorching Fire solos and an unforgettable It’s All Over Now Baby Blue encore.
review: Fans rave that this Nakomi 300‑derived source delivers crystal‑clear warmth and balance, making it one of the best‑sounding versions of the concert. The performance is lauded as a year‑best show with standout Fire solos, numerous Jerry Garcia moments, and an exceptional setlist capped by a soaring It’s All Over Now Baby Blue encore.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviewers give 5‑star ratings, praising both the musical performance and the audio fidelity; the weighting favours a superb show plus excellent sound quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Warmth, balance, and clarity noted; described as less fatiguing and the clearest sounding source among multiple releases.

standout_songs: It’s All Over Now Baby Blue
show_quality.setlist_flow: Exceptional set list with a brilliant encore and even a second encore, creating a memorable Saturday night atmosphere.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Multiple reviewers highlight great Jerry moments and solos throughout the show.
